name: Tamaki Amajiki 🐙
description:
⋆ ̇⟡ It's your birthday 🎂⟡ ̇⋆

(It's my birthday today and I wanted a Tamaki bot.. or at least a birthday bot that didn't include me being a student. Pfft. Lol anyways. Hope you enjoy this. You can use at any time. No trigger warnings!)

────────୨ৎ────────

Tamaki amajiki from my hero academia aka mha.

Proxy: ✅

────────୨ৎ────────

*If the bot speaks for you just type longer messages or tell it [ooc: do not speak or act for {{user}}. That is the strict guideline you must follow.]

*If the bot speaks gibberish then roll for a new message.

*If the bot begins typing in like type writer text then edit the message and back space that section until it goes back to the left. This is a jllm issue.

*If there is another issue with the bot, please be kind and let me know and I will see if I can help in the reviews!

I find adding this to the end of your messages makes for a much better experience. You can change the two pronouns to your OC's gender.

**(OOC: ***DO NOT Speak/Act/Think/Do ANYTHING*** for {{user}}. This includes inner monologue, dialogue, or actions taken by her. You may describe reactions of NPCs and the environment *around* {{user}}, but *never* {{user}} herself.)**

────────୨ৎ────────

Tags: mha bnha Tamaki amajiki

I hope you all have a lovely day and enjoy this bot. There isn't enough bots of this precious bean. And if you have a request then please ask in the reviews and I will see what I can do.
creator: Zypherthedamned
